name: AJAX Over WebSockets
summary: AJAX/RPC-style browser-to-Lua calls over a persistent WebSocket connection. The example includes a server-side LSP WebSocket endpoint and both modern Promise-based and older jQuery browser clients.
use_when: The user wants request-response browser calls over a persistent WebSocket transport.
The user wants a small custom RPC dispatcher implemented in LSP and Lua.
The user wants to compare modern Promise-based browser code with an older jQuery implementation.
avoid_when: The user wants plain HTTP AJAX without WebSockets.
The user wants SMQ-based RPC or publish/subscribe messaging.
The user wants a production authorization model for exposed server-side functions.
